message:
Fix subagent loading: simplify API to use sessionId lookup

The subagent API route was constructing a dirId from user/hostname/projectId
URL segments, which didn't match the database format for single-user setups.
Now the route looks up the project from the session row directly, needing
only sessionId and agentId. Removed projectId threading from SubagentPanel,
ToolCallInline, MessageBlock, and InfiniteMessageList.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
